name: part_004
file: tmp_【#Myth5years】hololive English -Myth- 5th Anniversary Concert： Fortune Spinner [HT_HUFi8DJ4]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_004.mov

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Ninomae Ina'nis performing "Sepia".
A transition scene featuring a glowing violet crystal heart.
Ninomae Ina'nis performing "Hiyururira Boppa" in a traditional-style kimono outfit.

subtitles.original: どうか神様 教えてくれますか
subtitles.english: Pray tell me, God

subtitles.original: 言葉少なに貴方に捧ぐ
subtitles.english: I give to you silently

subtitles.original: 今に消えてしまいそうなこの命を
subtitles.english: My life that's about to burn out

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 愛おしいセピア色した
subtitles.english: Ah, and these sepia-toned sights

subtitles.original: 何より大事なこの景色を
subtitles.english: They're most precious of all

subtitles.original: もう少し見ていたいよな
subtitles.english: I wish I could see them a bit more...

subtitles.original: I'm always gonna be my own worst enemy
subtitles.english: I'm always gonna be my own worst enemy

subtitles.original: Everything I ever wanted was in front of me
subtitles.english: Everything I ever wanted was in front of me

subtitles.original: The angels on my shoulder still cannot agree
subtitles.english: The angels on my shoulder still cannot agree

subtitles.original: If I was somebody else, could I get everything?
subtitles.english: If I was somebody else, could I get everything?

subtitles.original: I'm always gonna be my own worst enemy
subtitles.english: I'm always gonna be my own worst enemy

subtitles.original: Everything I ever wanted was in front of me
subtitles.english: Everything I ever wanted was in front of me

subtitles.original: The devils on my shoulder never let me be
subtitles.english: The devils on my shoulder never let me be

subtitles.original: Obsessing over tomorrows that I'll never see
subtitles.english: Obsessing over tomorrows that I'll never see

subtitles.original: Somebody save me
subtitles.english: Somebody save me

subtitles.original: My world is caving in cuz I thought I deserved it all for free, yeah yeah
subtitles.english: My world is caving in cuz I thought I deserved it all for free, yeah yeah

subtitles.original: 遠き日の夢を見るたび
subtitles.english: Every time I dream of days gone by

subtitles.original: 生まれた意味を考えてしまうの
subtitles.english: I wonder why I came to be

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 美しい青い日々だな
subtitles.english: Ah, such beautiful youthful days

subtitles.original: この目に焼き付けておこうかな
subtitles.english: Should burn their images into my mind

subtitles.original: もう少し強くならないとな
subtitles.english: But I'd have to be a little stronger first

subtitles.original: 晴れあられ 今踊れ踊れ 恋焦がれ遊べ 桜手打て
subtitles.english: A sunny hailstorm, now dance, dance, play with yearning, clap your hands with the cherry blossoms

subtitles.original: 花に紛れ 今をも取り戻せ 酔狂に遊べ さあここで踊れ
subtitles.english: Mingle with the flowers, reclaim the present, play with eccentricity, now dance right here

subtitles.original: 比夕の輪 散る窓 過ぎて行く
subtitles.english: The circles of evening sun pass the window where they scatter

subtitles.original: よりどりみどりさ 祭り囃子
subtitles.english: A vast selection of festival music

subtitles.original: 有るも無も 過去も 放り込み
subtitles.english: Throw in everything, existence and non-existence, even the past

subtitles.original: よく身を揉み行け 痛い痛い
subtitles.english: Rub your body well, it hurts, it hurts

subtitles.original: 人生より道 廻り道
subtitles.english: Life is more about detours and roundabouts

subtitles.original: 生きたいように 嫌われや
subtitles.english: Live as you want, even if you are hated

subtitles.original: 晴れあられ 今踊れ踊れ 恋焦がれ遊べ 桜手打て
subtitles.english: A sunny hailstorm, now dance, dance, play with yearning, clap your hands with the cherry blossoms

subtitles.original: 花に紛れ 今をも取り戻せ 酔狂に遊べ さあここで踊れ
subtitles.english: Mingle with the flowers, reclaim the present, play with eccentricity, now dance right here

subtitles.original: ゆるゆるりらら ゆるりらぱっぱ
subtitles.english: Yuru yururirara yururira pappa

subtitles.original: 昼を待ち 窓際 過ぎてった
subtitles.english: Waiting for the day, passing by the window

subtitles.original: さあ酸いも甘いも 祭り囃子
subtitles.english: Now, both sour and sweet, festival music

subtitles.original: 味わい尽くしてしまいましょう
subtitles.english: Let's taste it all to the fullest

subtitles.original: さあ何から平らげよう
subtitles.english: Now, what shall we devour first?

subtitles.original: 人生気付けば 野のごとし
subtitles.english: When you realize it, life is like a field

subtitles.original: 命の花を 打ち上げましょう
subtitles.english: Let's set off the flowers of life

subtitles.original: 晴れあられ 今踊れ踊れ 恋焦がれ遊べ 桜手打て
subtitles.english: A sunny hailstorm, now dance, dance, play with yearning, clap your hands with the cherry blossoms

subtitles.original: 花に紛れ 今をも取り戻せ 酔狂に遊べ さあここで踊れ
subtitles.english: Mingle with the flowers, reclaim the present, play with eccentricity, now dance right here

subtitles.original: ゆるゆるりらら ゆるりらぱっぱ
subtitles.english: Yuru yururirara yururira pappa

subtitles.original: 花よ花よ 誇りなさい
subtitles.english: Flower, oh flower, bloom with pride

subtitles.original: 包み隠すことなく 君のまま
subtitles.english: Without hiding anything, just as you are

subtitles.original: 上を向いて ごらんなさい
subtitles.english: Look up and see

subtitles.original: 最後の日まで 花であれ
subtitles.english: Be a flower until the final day

subtitles.original: 晴れあられ 今踊れ踊れ 恋焦がれ遊べ 桜手打て
subtitles.english: A sunny hailstorm, now dance, dance, play with yearning, clap your hands with the cherry blossoms

subtitles.original: 花に紛れ 今をも取り戻せ 酔狂に遊べ さあここで踊れ
subtitles.english: Mingle with the flowers, reclaim the present, play with eccentricity, now dance right here

subtitles.original: 晴れあられ 今踊れ踊れ 誰彼も遊べ 桜手打て
subtitles.english: A sunny hailstorm, now dance, dance, everyone play, clap your hands with the cherry blossoms

subtitles.original: 離れ離れ でも花火挙げて 酔狂に遊べ さあここで踊れ
subtitles.english: Separate, but let's set off fireworks, play with eccentricity, now dance right here

subtitles.original: ゆるゆるりらら ゆるりらぱっぱ
subtitles.english: Yuru yururirara yururira pappa
